title: EJ's PvP Pack
description: A PvP texture pack that optimizes the textures of items and blocks for a better and more cooler experience.
body:
EJ's PvP Pack is a texture pack that is designed for pvp. This is in beta right now so it is not fully done. 

-Some of the stuff that got retextured.

-Sword

-Axe

-End Crystals

-Respawn Anchor

-Totem Of Undying

-Glow Stone

-Grass Block
![Some of the Crystal PvP Essentials Retextured ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e2c720c2963e518ead688975b933807f3a79eea.png)

![Clearer image then the last one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fa42ce73ed0c1173944d0269cac26e676827606.png)
